final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original illustration of a cherry blossom season campus scene with a schoolgirl in a sailor uniform (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a 清新日系 aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include the girl standing in front of the school building, petals falling around her
Subject: must include a schoolgirl in a 水手服, pink cherry blossom petals falling, school building (教学楼) in background
Scene/backdrop: must include a sunny campus setting during cherry blossom season
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, warm, youthful (青春) atmosphere — exact light quality is yours
Color palette: needs a soft pink and warm pastel direction — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a clean, airy illustration surface treatment — exact line weight and texture are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must include gentle breeze effect on hair and petals
Avoid:
